message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title End Screen Action Sequences

actor User
rectangle "Views" #LightBlue {
    participant Game
    participant End
    participant HighScore
    participant Start
}
rectangle "User Interface Control" #LightBlue {
    participant Navigation
}
rectangle "Back End" #Purple {
    participant Settings
    participant JoggleCube
    participant HighScores
    participant Score
    participant Cube
    participant Block
}

note over Navigation,Block: High Score button clicked
User -> Game : btnHighScoreClicked()
activate Game
Game -> Navigation : show(ScreenType.HighScore)
activate Navigation
Navigation -> End : prepView()
activate End
End -> JoggleCube : getOverallHighScores()
activate JoggleCube
JoggleCube -> HighScores : getScores()
activate HighScores
HighScores --> JoggleCube : scores
deactivate HighScores
JoggleCube -> JoggleCube : getScores()
activate JoggleCube
JoggleCube --> JoggleCube : scores
deactivate JoggleCube
JoggleCube --> End : scores
deactivate JoggleCube
End -> JoggleCube : getCurrentCubeHighScores()
activate JoggleCube
JoggleCube -> Score : getScores()
activate Score
Score --> JoggleCube : scores
deactivate Score
JoggleCube --> End : scores
deactivate JoggleCube
End --> Navigation : 
deactivate End
Navigation -> End : hideOverlay(ScreenType.End)
activate End
End --> Navigation : 
deactivate End
Navigation --> Game : 
deactivate Navigation
Game --> User : 
deactivate Game

note over Navigation,Block: Menu Clicked
User -> Game : btnMenuClicked()
activate Game
Game -> Navigation : show(ScreenType.Start)
activate Navigation
Navigation -> Start : prepView()
activate Start
Start -> Settings : getCurrLang()
activate Settings
Settings --> Start : English
deactivate Settings
Start --> Navigation : 
deactivate Start
Navigation -> End : hideOverlay(ScreenType.End)
activate End
End --> Navigation : 
deactivate End
Navigation --> Game : 
deactivate Navigation
Game --> User : 
deactivate Game

note over Navigation,Block: Replay clicked
User -> Game : replayGrid()
activate Game
Game -> Navigation : show(ScreenType.GAME)
activate Navigation
Navigation -> Game : prepView()
activate Game
Game -> Cube : getCubeData()
activate Cube
Cube -> Cube : getCube()
activate Cube
Cube --> Cube : cube[3][3][3]
deactivate Cube
Cube --> Game : cube[3][3][3]
deactivate Cube
Game --> Navigation : 
deactivate Game
Navigation -> End : hideOverlay(ScreenType.End)
activate End
End --> Navigation : 
deactivate End
Navigation --> Game : 
deactivate Navigation
Game --> User : 
deactivate Game

note over Navigation,Block: Save Clicked
User -> Game : btnSaveClicked()
activate Game
Game -> JoggleCube : savGrid(filename)
activate JoggleCube
JoggleCube -> Cube : saveCube(outfile)
activate Cube
loop foreach Block
    Cube -> Block : getLetter()
    activate Block
    Block --> Cube : 
    deactivate Block
end
Cube --> JoggleCube : 
deactivate Cube
JoggleCube -> HighScores : saveScore(outfile)
activate HighScores
loop foreach score
    HighScores -> HighScores : save(outfile)
    activate HighScores
    HighScores --> HighScores : 
    deactivate HighScores
end
HighScores --> JoggleCube : 
deactivate HighScores
JoggleCube --> Game : 
deactivate JoggleCube
Game --> User : 
deactivate Game

@enduml
```
